name: 3js_chladni
description: Generative art simulation built with Three.js. This project simulates Chladni figures (nodal patterns formed on vibrating plates) using a particle system that reacts to a computed energy field. Instead of drawing explicit 2D contour lines, it generates an interference “terrain” from blended wave functions. Particles flow downhill (via gradient descent) and settle into low-energy valleys (nodes). ## [> Test it out](https://octaviaan.github.io/Chladni-Particles/)
